description: CompositionYellow round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with chest print, ribbing around inner neck, and nike swoosh on left sleeveFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours Do not bleach Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Cool iron Do not iron on the print Do not dry clean cricket is arguably a religion to Indians. This t-shirt is a further reinforcement of the belief with its cartoon chest print. The monochromatic chest print adds the fun element to your style, while the soft bright cotton keeps you cool and fresh all day. Pair it with jeans and slippers for that perfect casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.3”, Shoulders-19"
